questions.q: In a LAN, which of the following is the main advantage?
An application layer protocol used for creating chat rooms is ______.
The following are characteristics of a Network Topology except ______.
What is the term called when two or more LANs are connected together via a high-speed link (leased line) to form a larger network? (Any three features of the term)
questions.answer: Metropolitan Area Network (MAN), High-speed link, Leased line

questions.q: Explain the difference between a hub and a repeater.
questions.answer: A hub is a multiport repeater, which simply repeats the incoming signal to all ports. A repeater is used to extend the distance over which a digital signal can travel without attenuation.

questions.q: In a network, what is the term for the process of automatically assigning an IP address to a device?
The term ______ is used to describe a network that is not under a single administrative control.
What is the main difference between a collision domain and a broadcast domain?
questions.answer: A collision domain is the area where a collision can occur, whereas a broadcast domain is the area where a broadcast packet can be received.

questions.q: Explain the concept of subnetting. (Any three types of subnetting)
What is the term ______ used to describe a network where a device can communicate directly with other devices without the need for a router?
